Video.summary: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!
Video.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf

Image.alt: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf

Video.summary: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.
Video.title: He Who Smurfs Last

Video.summary: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.
Video.title: Jokey's Medecine

Video.summary: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.
Video.title: Farmer's Genie

Video.summary: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.
Video.title: Poet's Writers' Block

Video.summary: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?
Video.title: Tailor's Magic Needle

Video.summary: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....
Video.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends

Video.summary: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...
Video.title: Smurf Box Derby

Video.summary: Spectra is the Colour Fairy, the one whose wheel of colours make all the blues, reds, yellows and greens of the world. She is a friend of Painter Smurf, so when he takes the Smurflings to her home in her absence, the Smurflings fool around with the Colour Wheel... and all the colours disappear from the Earth. What's worse, without colours the Colour Fairy cannot live...
Video.title: The Colour Smurf

Video.summary: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!
Video.title: Smurfiplication

Video.summary: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.
Video.title: The Littlest Witch

Video.summary: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...
Video.title: Skyscraper Smurfs

Video.summary: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....
Video.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle

Video.summary: Brainy dons his safari hat and roams the forest to do good deeds for animals. He mostly gives advice to the creatures but balks when he can really save the life of a wildcat being hunted by Gargamel. Nat gives Brainy the courage to free the cat from Gargamel's trap.
Video.title: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals

Image.alt: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals
Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals

Video.summary: Did you know that if you catch a troll, he may grant you one wish? It just happens that Aloysius the Troll gets caught in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. Snappy Smurf sets him free and as a reward, gets to make all other Smurfs obey his every whim. Now this brings a lot of trouble to the Smurfs, as Smurflings, sometimes, ask for things that are not good for them... or anybody else.
Video.title: Snappy's Way

Video.summary: Everyone has their own dreams. That of Smurfette is to meet the legendary Don Smurfo, the dashing, witty, swashbuckling hero of many an engrossing tale. The Smurfs shrug at this infatuation. But when a real-life Don Smurfo appears in the village and Smurfette snubs them all in favor of the bragging stranger, they take the matter a little more seriously.
Video.title: Don Smurfo

Video.summary: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....
Video.title: Smurf On The Run

Video.summary: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.
Video.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs

Video.summary: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!
Video.title: Baby's Marvelous Toy

Video.summary: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.
Video.title: The Royal Drum

Video.summary: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.
Video.title: Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow

Video.summary: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?
Video.title: A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I

Image.alt: A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I
A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I
A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I

Video.summary: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...
Video.title: Snappy's Puppet

Video.summary: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...
Video.title: No Smurf Is An Island

Video.summary: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...
Video.title: Crooner Smurf

Video.summary: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.
Video.title: Baby Smurf Is Missing

Video.summary: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...
Video.title: Smurfing Out Of Time

Video.summary: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.
Video.title: The Memory Melon

Video.summary: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.
Video.title: A Smurf For Denisa

Video.summary: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.
Video.title: Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure

Video.summary: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...
Video.title: Poltersmurf

Video.summary: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.
Video.title: Greedy And The Porridge Pot

Video.summary: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...
Video.title: The Most Unsmurfy Games

Video.summary: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.
Video.title: The Noble Stag

Video.summary: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.
Video.title: Curried Smurfs

Video.summary: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.
Video.title: Hopping Cough Smurfs

Video.summary: The Smurfs are on a paradise Pacific Island. Well, not exactly paradise, since there is a very active volcano, on which a very active Hefty Smurf risks his life as well as Smurfette's!
Video.title: Like It Or Smurf It

Video.summary: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.
Video.title: Jokey's Funny Bone

Video.summary: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...
Video.title: Lazy's Nightmare

Video.summary: Spring has the Smurfs all competing for Smurfette's affection and Gargamel decides to put a spell on her to help him capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf intervenes and with the help of the foolish Azrael he foils the wizard's plans.
Video.title: Romeo And Smurfette

Video.summary: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?
Video.title: Hefty's Rival

Video.summary: Smurfs try to avoid contact with humans. But this time, Sassette is happy to be friends with a little witch called Melina, whose spells often end up in disaster. And anyway, are witches really human? At any rate, wizards such as Gargamel are.
Video.title: Sassette's Bewitching Friendship

Video.summary: Smurfs would make delicious meals for the evil wizard Gargamel if it weren't for two things: they're difficult to catch and they're so tiny. Now, suppose there were a formula to change these bite-size snacks into big, juicy square blue meals... Gargamel has an idea...
Video.title: Little Big Smurf

Video.summary: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.
Video.title: The Astrosmurf

Video.summary: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...
Video.title: Tis The Season To Be Smurfy

Image.alt: Tis The Season To Be Smurfy
Tis The Season To Be Smurfy
Tis The Season To Be Smurfy

Video.summary: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...
Video.title: Put Upon Puppy

Video.summary: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He’d be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha’s dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.
Video.title: Where The Wild Smurfs Are

Video.summary: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.
Video.title: Baby's First Word

Video.summary: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.
Video.title: The Littlest Giant

Video.summary: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.
Video.title: Papa's Flying Bed

Video.summary: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.
Video.title: Chip Off The Old Smurf

Video.summary: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.
Video.title: Calling Dr Smurf

Video.summary: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.
Video.title: Smurfing For Gold

Video.summary: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...
Video.title: The Root Of Evil

Video.summary: Clockwork Smurf is feeling so lonely that, out of compassion, Handy Smurf builds a female companion for him. The trouble is, Clockwork Smurfette does not know she's supposed to have eyes only for her mechanical counterpart, or that she should avoid Gargamel....
Video.title: Clockwork Smurfette

Video.summary: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.
Video.title: Baby's First Christmas

Video.summary: When Scruple, helper to the evil Gargamel, finds the Great Book of Spells in his master's cellar, he asks for the power to be the world's most powerful wizard. This means trouble for the poor little Smurfs...
Video.title: Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells

Image.alt: Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells
Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells
Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells

Video.summary: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.
Video.title: A Little Smurf Confidence

Video.summary: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.
Video.title: Smurfs That Time Forgot

Video.summary: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?
Video.title: Swapping Smurfs

Video.summary: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?
Video.title: The Littlest Viking

Video.summary: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.
Video.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep

Video.summary: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...
Video.title: The Gallant Smurf

Video.summary: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?
Video.title: Master Scruple

Video.summary: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.
Video.title: The Sorcerer Smurf

Video.summary: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.
Video.title: The Smurf Who Would Be King

Image.alt: The Smurf Who Would Be King
The Smurf Who Would Be King
The Smurf Who Would Be King

Video.summary: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.
Video.title: April Smurf's Day

Video.summary: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?
Video.title: Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow

Video.summary: When Smurfette meets this gentle old gypsy woman in the forest and receives a swirling multicoloured dress, she's delighted. How could she know that this woman is really the evil wizard Gargamel in disguise, and that there is a terrible spell on the beautiful dress?
Video.title: Soothsayer Smurfette

Video.summary: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.
Video.title: Jungle Jitterbug

Video.summary: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.
Video.title: Hefty's Heart
